human_confirmation.confirmation_text: 柱列廊道近身压迫 → 湿石阶高低差战斗 → 檐口/屋顶边缘收束

beat_01.name: column_corridor_close_pressure
beat_01.function: expand close combat into architecture line control
action_design: pillars create occlusion and tactical line changes
one fighter uses column line to break angle
forearm, palm, and shoulder contacts are hard and brief
beat_01.camera_function: lateral track through pillar/corridor line while keeping both fighters readable
future_prompt_notes: make the pillar/corridor anchor active, not decorative
avoid long bind and soft push-hands rhythm

beat_02.name: wet_stair_height_difference_combat
beat_02.environment: wet stone stairs / step edge / railing if available
beat_02.function: introduce verticality, slip recovery, and forced displacement
action_design: combat shifts onto rain-slick stone steps
footwork shows traction, slip, recovery, pivot, and forced sidestep
one fighter nearly loses footing but recovers into counter-pressure
beat_02.camera_function: slight rising or diagonal follow only if the feet remain visibly anchored to steps
future_prompt_notes: describe shoe/boot contact on wet step edges
use stair height to change guard and strike angles
forbid floaty rooftop leap or big jump

beat_03.name: eaves_roof_edge_endpoint
beat_03.environment: eaves / roof edge / visible tiles / wooden structure
beat_03.function: end with spatial escalation cue toward SHOT-04
action_design: combat reaches eaves or roof-edge area
tiles, roofline, and wooden eaves become visible anchors
ending implies next escalation toward roof or structure in SHOT-04
no full temple destruction in SHOT-03
beat_03.camera_function: hold enough architecture for continuity and exit direction; do not hide contact behind eaves
future_prompt_notes: use roof edge as endpoint, not full roof duel
keep structure intact except minor tile/wood feedback

action_design: tactical use of pillars and stair height
footwork with traction, slip, recovery, pivot
defender reaction through torso displacement, guard collapse, forced sidestep, or foot skid
environment_anchor_requirements: at least one clear pillar/corridor anchor
at least one clear stair/step-height anchor
camera_design: use lateral tracking or slight rising follow as fighters move from corridor to stairs
identity_requirements: Fenshou and Shuangji must remain visually distinct

future_package_design.likely_task_type_to_review: multimodal2video if multiple identity/scene references are needed; otherwise choose the smallest CLI-legal task type after command-contract preflight

route_risks: model may jump to roof too early
destruction may escalate too early into SHOT-04/05
mitigation: keep roof edge as endpoint, not full roof duel
forbid full temple destruction in SHOT-03
use short hard contacts and rebound
